/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libvs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/vs_msgs/msg/cone_location__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/vs_msgs/msg/cone_location_pixel__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vs_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/vs_msgs/msg/parking_error__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/racecar_ws/build/vs_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libvs_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
